spec.name: The Grand Gate Of Thalos
spec.description: You stand in the archway of a gigantic stone archway. The two steel gates have been forced open and have rusted in place. A hollow gust of wind blows by you into the deserted, and seemingly destroyed, city.

east.description: The desert sands stretch on for miles and miles.

west.description: You see devastation everywhere. Houses lie in ruin and skeletons litter the streets. You see strange beasts stalking the shadows.
